justifications.clarity: Definitions are precise (Definition 1 maps V to R+ with explicit variables), transitions reference future sections via \ref{} in the roadmap, and EDGAR API endpoints are introduced incrementally before code; learning-objectives remark orients readers at chapter opening.
justifications.rigor: FCFF-FCFE relationship has a formal proof from first principles; assumptions are explicitly stated (g < WACC for Gordon Growth Model validity enforced in simulation code); corrected partial derivatives are internally consistent; minor deduction for placeholder citation on LLM arithmetic reliability.
justifications.completeness: All 9 sections and 32 subsections contain real content: 11 Python listings, 18 labelled equations, 5 formal definitions, 1 proposition with proof, 3 worked examples, and end-to-end case study; minor deduction for absent WACC estimation discussion (in-scope gap).
justifications.pedagogy: Eight learning objectives map one-to-one to chapter sections; example difficulty progresses from single FCFF computation to full pipeline; code annotated with docstrings; chapter roadmap in Section 1.3 explicitly sequences each section's contribution.
justifications.style: Prose is natural and avoids filler phrases; FCFF/DA/WACC notation is consistent throughout; LaTeX environments and labels follow prescribed conventions with no \paragraph{} headings; minor deductions for Python 3.10+ union-type hints without version note and one or two generic listing captions.
